response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The Reference JSON provided lyrics for 'The Everlasting Guilty Crown,' which matched the audio from 01:03 onwards. However, it incorrectly identified 00:00–01:03 as instrumental; this segment contains the conclusion of the song 'Yakusoku' (Promise). 2. JSON Usage: The JSON was fully utilized for the second song. Manual transcription and translation were required for the first minute of vocals. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are strictly anchored to vocal onset. Visual text for the song title and credits was included during the transition.

subtitles.original: ずっと今がこのまま続いたらいいね
subtitles.english: I wish this moment would last forever

subtitles.original: 今度は僕から掴んでみせるよ
subtitles.english: Next time, I'll be the one to grab hold

subtitles.original: 約束しよう
subtitles.english: Let's make a promise

subtitles.original: 約束をしよう
subtitles.english: Let's make a promise

subtitles.original:
The Everlasting Guilty Crown
Lyrics, Music: ryo (supercell)
subtitles.english:
[Song: The Everlasting Guilty Crown]
[Lyrics, Music: ryo (supercell)]

subtitles.original: 世界は終わりを告げようとしてる
subtitles.english: The world is trying to proclaim its end,

subtitles.original: 誰にももう止められはしない
subtitles.english: And no one has been able to stop that.

subtitles.original: ———始まる
subtitles.english: It begins...

subtitles.original: 崩壊のシンフォニーが鳴り響いて
subtitles.english: A symphony of destruction resounds everywhere,

subtitles.original: 降る雨はまるで涙の音色
subtitles.english: And the falling raindrops are like the sound of the tears.

subtitles.original: 教えて
subtitles.english: Tell me:

subtitles.original: 支配し支配され人たちは
subtitles.english: The people, who govern and who is being governed,

subtitles.original: いつかその心に憎しみを
subtitles.english: One day hatred will settle in their hearts,

subtitles.original: そして愛することを思い出せず
subtitles.english: And then, not remembering what it means to love,

subtitles.original: 争うの？
subtitles.english: They will attack each other?

subtitles.original: この歌が聴こえてる
subtitles.english: I hear this song!

subtitles.original: 命あるすべてのものよ
subtitles.english: You, all living beings,

subtitles.original: 真実はあなたの胸の中にある
subtitles.english: The truth is in your hearts,

subtitles.original: 嵐の海を行くときも
subtitles.english: Because, even when you’re sailing through a stormy sea,

subtitles.original: 決して臆することのない強さを
subtitles.english: It gives you the strength not to be afraid of anything,

subtitles.original: くれるから
subtitles.english: Because it will give it to you.

subtitles.original: けれども進むほど風は強い
subtitles.english: However the further we go, the stronger the wind becomes,

subtitles.original: 希望の火はやがて消えていく
subtitles.english: And now the flame of hope begins to fade.

subtitles.original: 「明かりをよこせ」と奪い合い
subtitles.english: “Give the light to me!” — people start taking it away,

subtitles.original: 果てに人は殺し合う
subtitles.english: And in the end they just kill each other...

subtitles.original: 涙などとうに枯れて
subtitles.english: And their tears have long dried up.

subtitles.original: 気づいて
subtitles.english: Understand:

subtitles.original: その目は互いを認めるため
subtitles.english: The eyes are given to us, to notice each other.

subtitles.original: その声は想いを伝えるため
subtitles.english: The voice is given to us, to convey our feelings.

subtitles.original: その手は大事な人と繋ぐためにある
subtitles.english: The hands are given to us, to bind ourselves to those who are dear to us.

subtitles.original: この歌が聴こえてる
subtitles.english: I hear this song!

subtitles.original: 世界中の寄る辺なきものよ
subtitles.english: You, who are abandoned by everyone in this world,

subtitles.original: 希望はあなたの胸の中にある
subtitles.english: The hope lives in your hearts,

subtitles.original: 燃え盛る炎の中でも
subtitles.english: Because, even when you’re in a blazing flame,

subtitles.original: 決して傷つくことのない強さを
subtitles.english: It gives you the strength not to get hurt by anything,

subtitles.original: くれるから
subtitles.english: Because it will give it to you.

subtitles.original: その手で守ろうとしたものは
subtitles.english: What you’re trying to protect with your hands,

subtitles.original: 愛するものだったのだろうか
subtitles.english: Are the ones you really love, aren’t they?

subtitles.original: 赤く染まったその手を眺めて
subtitles.english: After looking at these hands painted scarlet,

subtitles.original: やっと自らがしてきた愚かさを
subtitles.english: You finally realize the stupidity of your own actions,

subtitles.original: 過ちと認めるその罪を
subtitles.english: That sin that you admit is your mistake,

subtitles.original: 止めどなく溢れるその涙を知る
subtitles.english: And you come to know those uncontrollable, overflowing tears.
